name: Pumpkin W/Rice Stuffing
recipeIngredient: 1 5 lb. or 6 lb. pumpkin (ensure there is a stem)
1 medium celery stalk (to yield 1/2 cup), sliced
2 slices whole wheat bread, cut into cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Cut the lid from the top of the pumpkin.
3. Remove seeds and fibers from the pumpkin.
4. Melt butter in a 10-inch skillet over medium heat.
5. Cook onion and celery in butter, stirring occasionally until tender.
6. Stir in the remaining ingredients except cider.
7. Fill the pumpkin with the rice mixture.
8. Pour cider over the rice mixture.
9. Cover with the pumpkin lid.
10. Place the pumpkin in an ungreased 8 x 8-inch pan.
11. Bake for about 2 hours or until the pumpkin is tender.
12. Let stand for 15 minutes.
13. To serve, remove the lid and cut the pumpkin into wedges.
